archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Dark Mode Cinematic Vibe

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold font-heading
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold font-heading

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-[100dvh] relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white

feed.parent: h-[100dvh] w-full overflow-y-scroll snap-y snap-mandatory bg-black relative
feed.video_container: h-[100dvh] w-full snap-start relative flex flex-col justify-end bg-black
feed.overlay_text: absolute bottom-20 right-0 p-4 w-3/4 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/40 to-transparent z-10 flex flex-col gap-2
feed.floating_actions: absolute bottom-24 left-4 flex flex-col gap-6 items-center z-20

rtl_specifics.margins: Use ms-* and me-* instead of ml-* and mr-*
rtl_specifics.paddings: Use ps-* and pe-* instead of pl-* and pr-*
rtl_specifics.text_alignment: Use text-start for right-aligned Arabic text, text-end for left-aligned

buttons.primary: bg-[#E3FF00] text-black font-bold font-heading rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#CCEA00] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E3FF00]/50 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white font-medium font-heading rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors backdrop-blur-md active:scale-95
buttons.icon_action: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 text-white hover:text-[#E3FF00] transition-colors

cards.base: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-6
cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4

inputs.base: bg-[#1F1F1F] border border-[#333333] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-neutral-500 focus:border-[#E3FF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E3FF00] transition-all outline-none rtl:text-right w-full

bottom_nav.container: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-white/10 flex justify-around items-center h-16 pb-safe z-50
bottom_nav.item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 w-full h-full text-neutral-400 hover:text-white transition-colors
bottom_nav.item_active: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 w-full h-full text-[#E3FF00]

icons.notes: Ensure directional icons (arrows, chevrons) are flipped for RTL.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute. Example: data-testid='submit-booking-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Set <html dir='rtl' lang='ar'> in your main entry file (e.g., index.html or document layout).
Ensure all text is strictly Arabic. Do not leave placeholder text in English.
Typography Setup: Add Google Fonts link in index.html for Cairo and Tajawal. Extend tailwind.config.js to include font-heading (Cairo) and font-body (Tajawal).
RTL Layout Rule: Exclusively use logical properties in Tailwind (ms-*, me-*, ps-*, pe-*, text-start). Avoid hardcoded left/right paddings margins like ml-* or pr-* unless overriding logic.
Mobile TikTok Layout: Build the app within a max-w-md mx-auto container to simulate a mobile app view on desktop, full width on mobile.
Video Feed Logic: Use standard CSS Scroll Snapping (snap-y snap-mandatory on parent container, snap-start on child). Each video item takes 100dvh.

Floating UI in RTL Feed: The video text details (creator name, description) stay on the right side (bottom-0 right-0). The action buttons (Like, Comment, Booking) should be on the LEFT side (bottom-24 left-4) to avoid overlapping the Arabic text which flows right-to-left.

Visual Identity: The theme is dark, cinematic, and professional. The primary CTA color is Electric Yellow (#E3FF00). Use it exclusively for main actions like 'Book Service' or 'Order Now' to maximize conversion.
Testing: Add data-testid to EVERY clickable element (buttons, links, video interactions) following kebab-case formatting.
